text: I feel curious and thoughtful, caught between the sterile utility of the corridor and the vibrant invitation of the exhibition inside. The glass partitions and stark lighting make me reflect on the barriers—both physical and conceptual—that separate inquiry from discovery. Stepping inside, the R+D wall greets me with the promise of innovation and connection, and I am both inspired by the possibilities and aware of my own smallness amid the ever-evolving conversation between humans and technology. The space draws out a longing to belong, to contribute, and to better understand the complex web of ideas around me.
